prerequisites: A Rollbar account with at least one project that is collecting items.
An account access token with the read scope, used for account-level GET operations.
A project access token with the read scope, used for project-level GET operations.
A start_date value marking the earliest point from which to read data.

authMethods.name: Account access token
authMethods.summary: Maps to the account_access_token secret field. Rollbar account-level access tokens authenticate account-scoped requests and are sent in the X-Rollbar-Access-Token HTTP header. Account access tokens support read (all account-level GET operations) and write (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) scopes; a read-scope token is sufficient for extraction.

authMethods.name: Project access token
authMethods.summary: Maps to the project_access_token secret field. Rollbar project-level access tokens authenticate project-scoped requests and are also sent in the X-Rollbar-Access-Token header. Each project has its own set of tokens managed under Project > Settings > Project Access Tokens, with scopes post_server_item, post_client_item, read (all GET requests), and write (PATCH and DELETE). A token with the read scope is required for extraction.

setupSteps.title: Create or locate a project access token
setupSteps.body: In the Rollbar UI, open Project > Settings > Project Access Tokens. Each project is created with one token per scope. Copy a token that has the read scope, which permits all GET requests for that project. Use this value for the project_access_token field.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an account access token
setupSteps.body: Generate an account-level access token from your Rollbar account settings. Account access tokens authorize account-scoped GET operations under the read scope. Copy a token with the read scope and use it for the account_access_token field.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the start_date field to the earliest date from which records should be read. Data created before this date is not pulled.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and run the sync
setupSteps.body: Enter account_access_token, project_access_token, and start_date. Both tokens are sent to the Rollbar REST API via the X-Rollbar-Access-Token header to authenticate requests. Save the configuration to begin reading data.

sources.title: Rollbar API - Getting Started (REST API reference, authentication via X-Rollbar-Access-Token header; account vs project access token scopes)
Rollbar Docs - Access Tokens (project access token scopes: post_server_item, post_client_item, read, write; managed under Project > Settings > Project Access Tokens)
